<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:809px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.14px;">shall have the following meanings: </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:112px;bottom:748px;letter-spacing:-0.16px;">Month </span><span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:748px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.14px;">English Calendar Month </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:112px;bottom:709px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;word-spacing:0.21px;">Allocated Seats - </span><span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:709px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:4.15px;">Designated office space as described in Contract Cover </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:687px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:10.04px;">Sheet and earmarked on the layout plan attached </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:664px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;">herewith; </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:112px;bottom:625px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:0.22px;">Coworking Space - </span><span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:625px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:3.36px;">Means the premises or the building or the portion of a </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:603px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:0.24px;">building wherein the Allocated Seats are located </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:112px;bottom:564px;letter-spacing:-0.06px;word-spacing:0.24px;">Freebies - </span><span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:564px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:5.6px;">Access to services during the Fully Serviced Business </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:541px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:1.84px;">Hours to be provided by Ofis Square to the Client at the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:519px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:-0.29px;">Coworking Space without any charges to the extent agreed </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:496px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:8.58px;">and recorded in the Contract Coversheet which are </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:473px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;word-spacing:0.1px;">otherwise chargeable. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:112px;bottom:434px;letter-spacing:-0.07px;word-spacing:0.1px;">Free Services - </span><span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:434px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:1.28px;">Cost of electricity (at the existing load), Access to existing </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:412px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:3.7px;">air conditioning, internet services (shared bandwidth at </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:389px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:0.09px;">the common areas of the Coworking Space), existing office </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:367px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;">equipment, </span><span class="t s9" style="left:520px;bottom:367px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;">designated </span><span class="t s9" style="left:629px;bottom:367px;letter-spacing:-0.15px;">common </span><span class="t s9" style="left:719px;bottom:367px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;">spaces, </span><span class="t s9" style="left:799px;bottom:367px;letter-spacing:-0.06px;">knowledge </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:344px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.07px;">resources, pantry, cafeteria, concierge, community events, </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:321px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:2.68px;">earmarked consumables, other common areas, facilities, </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:298px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:1.19px;">services earmarked for free use of Client in common with </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:276px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:3.8px;">other Clients at the Coworking Space, during the Fully </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:253px;letter-spacing:-0.06px;word-spacing:-0.26px;">Serviced Business Hours. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:112px;bottom:214px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.2px;">Pay As You Go Services - </span><span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:214px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:1.21px;">Access to services which may be provided by Ofis Square </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:192px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.85px;">from time to time on a chargeable basis at the Coworking </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:169px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.09px;">Space as mentioned in the Contract Cover Sheet. </span></div>

</div>

<div class="text-container"><span class="t s5" style="left:804px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:0.19px;">Page </span><span class="t s6" style="left:838px;bottom:1110px;">3 </span><span class="t s5" style="left:849px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:-0.31px;">of </span><span class="t s6" style="left:865px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:0.09px;">12 </span>
<span class="t s7" style="left:161px;bottom:33px;letter-spacing:0.09px;word-spacing:-0.18px;">Ofis Square </span>
<span class="t s7" style="left:731px;bottom:31px;letter-spacing:0.06px;">Client </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:112px;bottom:1062px;letter-spacing:-0.06px;word-spacing:0.05px;">Lock in Period - </span><span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:1062px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:1.97px;">The Period for which Fixed Payments are payable by the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:1039px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:6.82px;">Client irrespective of continuance of this Contract as </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:1016px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.13px;">mentioned in the Contract Coversheet. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:112px;bottom:978px;letter-spacing:-0.06px;word-spacing:0.01px;">Notice Period - </span><span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:978px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.45px;">Notice period to be served by the Client to bring an end to </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:955px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.16px;">this Contract signed between the Parties. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:112px;bottom:916px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.23px;">Committed Fixed Charges - </span><span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:916px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:4.14px;">Sum Total of the Fixed Payment Payable by the Client </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:893px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:5.83px;">during the entire tenure of the agreed Lock-in Period </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:870px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:-0.59px;">including escalations and applicable taxes thereof, without </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:848px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.04px;">any adjustments, deductions or abatements. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:112px;bottom:809px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.1px;">Material Breach by Client - </span><span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:809px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:-0.34px;">Any breach by the Client which would affect the essence of </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:787px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.06px;">the Contract which shall include but not limited to breach </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:764px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:7.47px;">of terms of this Contract, Default in payment for 2 </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:741px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:1.23px;">successive Months or 3 cumulative Months in a calendar </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:718px;letter-spacing:-0.15px;word-spacing:5.21px;">year, failure to make good any damage caused to the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:696px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:1.46px;">Coworking Space or any facilities, amenities, equipments </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:673px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;">etc. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:117px;bottom:634px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;word-spacing:-0.06px;">Material Breach by Ofis Square - </span><span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:634px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:4.15px;">Any breach by the Ofis Square which would affect the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:612px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:-0.61px;">essence of the Contract which shall include but not limited </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:589px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:3.03px;">to breach of terms of this Contract or failure to provide </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:566px;letter-spacing:-0.07px;word-spacing:-1.02px;">Services for a period exceeding the timelines agreed herein. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:112px;bottom:528px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.25px;">Immediate Termination - </span><span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:528px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:1.85px;">Termination without needing Notice Period or any option </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:505px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;">to cure any breach. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:112px;bottom:466px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.23px;">Fully Serviced Business Hours - </span><span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:466px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:8.89px;">Period during which the services attached with the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:443px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:1.14px;">Allocated Seats are to be provided by Ofis Square as part </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:421px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.02px;">of Fixed Payment. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:112px;bottom:382px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:0.02px;">Fixed Payment - </span><span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:382px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:-0.79px;">The amount payable by the Client by the 7 </span>
<span class="t sa" style="left:751px;bottom:388px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;">th </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:765px;bottom:382px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:-0.56px;">of each Month, </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:359px;letter-spacing:-0.17px;word-spacing:4.58px;">in advance, commencing from the month in which the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:336px;letter-spacing:-0.15px;word-spacing:3.47px;">Commencement Date falls and ending on the 7 </span>
<span class="t sa" style="left:817px;bottom:343px;letter-spacing:-0.2px;">th </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:836px;bottom:336px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:3.43px;">of the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:314px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:0.16px;">Month in which this Contract is due to expire. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:112px;bottom:275px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.25px;">Exit Formalities - </span><span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:275px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">1) </span><span class="t s9" style="left:435px;bottom:275px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;word-spacing:-0.01px;">Payment of all dues; </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:255px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">2) </span><span class="t s9" style="left:435px;bottom:255px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:-0.01px;">Surrender of access cards </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:236px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">3) </span><span class="t s9" style="left:435px;bottom:236px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:7.04px;">Removal of all third party cabling and any other </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:435px;bottom:216px;letter-spacing:-0.07px;word-spacing:1.9px;">installations and restoration of the Allocated Seats in </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:435px;bottom:196px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.14px;">the original position; </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:177px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">4) </span><span class="t s9" style="left:435px;bottom:177px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;word-spacing:0.85px;">Inventory tally as per the inventory list shared by Ofis </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:435px;bottom:157px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:3.08px;">Square with Client on the date of commencement of </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:435px;bottom:137px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;">Contract; </span></div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="text-container"><span class="t s5" style="left:804px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:0.19px;">Page </span><span class="t s6" style="left:838px;bottom:1110px;">4 </span><span class="t s5" style="left:849px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:-0.31px;">of </span><span class="t s6" style="left:865px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:0.09px;">12 </span>
<span class="t s7" style="left:161px;bottom:33px;letter-spacing:0.09px;word-spacing:-0.18px;">Ofis Square </span>
<span class="t s7" style="left:731px;bottom:31px;letter-spacing:0.06px;">Client </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:1062px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">5) </span><span class="t s9" style="left:435px;bottom:1062px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;word-spacing:1.08px;">Payment of applicable exit charges in case of damage, </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:435px;bottom:1042px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:9.94px;">destruction, missing inventory and Cleaning and </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:435px;bottom:1022px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:-0.05px;">Restoration Fees payable on Exit; </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:1003px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">6) </span><span class="t s9" style="left:435px;bottom:1003px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;word-spacing:-1.09px;">Complete removal of the Client and all persons from the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:435px;bottom:983px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:4.15px;">Allocated Seats along with all goods, properties and </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:435px;bottom:963px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:-0.26px;">assets brought into the Coworking Space by the Client; </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:943px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">7) </span><span class="t s9" style="left:435px;bottom:943px;letter-spacing:-0.07px;word-spacing:0.65px;">Upto date paid bills of third-party utilities obtained by </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:435px;bottom:924px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.15px;">the Client at the Coworking Space; </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:904px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">8) </span><span class="t s9" style="left:435px;bottom:904px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:2.64px;">Documents showing removal of the Coworking Space </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:435px;bottom:884px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:4.07px;">address from the records of all Statutory and other </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:435px;bottom:864px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:6.3px;">authorities including shifting of registered office (if </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:435px;bottom:844px;letter-spacing:-0.07px;">applicable). </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:112px;bottom:804px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:3.11px;">Interest free Refundable Security </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:112px;bottom:782px;letter-spacing:-0.06px;">Deposit </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:804px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:1.62px;">The agreed sum as recorded in the Contract Cover Sheet </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:782px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.86px;">which shall be held by Ofis Square until Client completes </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:759px;letter-spacing:-0.07px;word-spacing:1.15px;">all Exit Formalities and shall be refunded by Ofis Square </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:736px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:8.14px;">within 30 days after all Exit Formalities have been </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:713px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:6.65px;">completed by the Client, without any interest of any </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:691px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:0.11px;">manner whatsoever. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:112px;bottom:652px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;word-spacing:0.1px;">Enterprise Services </span><span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:652px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.07px;">Access to Allocated Seats along with the Free Services and </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:407px;bottom:629px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.13px;">Pay as You Go Services </span>
<span class="t s8" style="left:118px;bottom:551px;letter-spacing:-0.2px;">II. </span><span class="t s8" style="left:165px;bottom:551px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;">Scope</span><span class="t s9" style="left:217px;bottom:551px;">: </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:512px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">1. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:512px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.51px;">Client has obtained Enterprise Services from Ofis Square at its Coworking Space for the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:492px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.15px;">purposes of using the same as its office space for the agreed Duration. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:472px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">2. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:472px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:-0.36px;">Ofis Square as part of such Enterprise Services has agreed to provide access and granted </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:453px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:-0.96px;">permission to the Client to enter and use the Allocated Seats situated at a designated area </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:433px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:0.4px;">as per the attached layout herein along with access to the Free Services and Pay As You </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:413px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.37px;">Go Services. Freebies to the extent specified shall be deemed to be included in the Fixed </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:393px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;">Payments. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:373px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">3. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:373px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:2.27px;">No tenancy or other right, title or interest and/or possession whatsoever is created or </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:354px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.15px;">intended to be created by this Contract in favor of the Client. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:334px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">4. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:334px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:0.03px;">Ofis Square has in view of the client agreeing to the Lock in Period, the Notice Period and </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:314px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:2.3px;">having undertaken to pay the Committed Fixed Charges in the form of periodic Fixed </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:295px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:-0.01px;">Payment and the Pay as You Go Services (if any), has agreed to not charge any induction </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:275px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.04px;">fee or cost to be incurred by the Client. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:255px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">5. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:255px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:0.01px;">This Contract shall become effective immediately upon the date of its execution. </span>
<span class="t s8" style="left:112px;bottom:216px;letter-spacing:-0.2px;">III. </span><span class="t s8" style="left:165px;bottom:216px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:0.18px;">Rights granted to the Client: </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:137px;bottom:176px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">1. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:176px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.41px;">The Client shall be entitled to use the Allocated Seats for the purposes of carrying on its </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:157px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;word-spacing:0.02px;">office wherein the Client shall be entitled to allow its own employees, to attend and carry </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:137px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.12px;">on work. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:137px;bottom:117px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">2. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:117px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:-0.25px;">The Client must use the Allocated Seats for office purposes only. Use of Coworking Space </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:97px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;word-spacing:0.12px;">or the Allocated Seats for business of any nature involving frequent visits by members of </span></div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="text-container"><span class="t s5" style="left:804px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:0.19px;">Page </span><span class="t s6" style="left:838px;bottom:1110px;">5 </span><span class="t s5" style="left:849px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:-0.31px;">of </span><span class="t s6" style="left:865px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:0.09px;">12 </span>
<span class="t s7" style="left:161px;bottom:33px;letter-spacing:0.09px;word-spacing:-0.18px;">Ofis Square </span>
<span class="t s7" style="left:731px;bottom:31px;letter-spacing:0.06px;">Client </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:1062px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.07px;">the public or as a retail, residential or living space or for any non-business purpose shall </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:1043px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.48px;">not be permitted. The Allocated Seats cannot be used for the purposes of demonstration </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:1023px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.15px;">or display of products. The Client shall not be entitled to invite public at large for visiting </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:1003px;letter-spacing:0.02px;">it </span><span class="t s9" style="left:195px;bottom:1003px;letter-spacing:0.06px;">at </span><span class="t s9" style="left:231px;bottom:1003px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:13.84px;">the Coworking </span><span class="t s9" style="left:382px;bottom:1003px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;">Space </span><span class="t s9" style="left:450px;bottom:1003px;letter-spacing:0.02px;">or </span><span class="t s9" style="left:486px;bottom:1003px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:13.73px;">the Allocated </span><span class="t s9" style="left:626px;bottom:1003px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:13.69px;">Seats, except </span><span class="t s9" style="left:767px;bottom:1003px;letter-spacing:0.01px;">in </span><span class="t s9" style="left:802px;bottom:1003px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;">pre-booked </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:983px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.09px;">Meeting/Conference/Training Rooms subject to payment of charges as applicable and to </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:964px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.14px;">the capacity of such Meeting/Conference/Training Rooms. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:137px;bottom:944px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">3. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:944px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:-0.23px;">The Client shall be entitled to enjoy Enterprise Services obtained from Ofis Square during </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:924px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:-0.96px;">the entire period of subsistence of this Contract, subject to payment of the Fixed Payments </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:905px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:0.82px;">and the Pay as You Go Service charges and also subject to adherence and fulfillment of </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:885px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:-0.61px;">its obligations hereunder as also strictly following and complying with the User Rules and </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:865px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:-0.62px;">Regulations framed from time to time relating to use of the various facilities and amenities </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:845px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.12px;">made available at the Coworking Space. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:137px;bottom:826px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">4. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:826px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.38px;">The Client shall not be entitled to allow entry of person (employees or visitors) exceeding </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:806px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:-0.01px;">the number of workstations obtained by the Client as part of the Allocated Seats. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:137px;bottom:786px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">5. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:786px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:0.12px;">All visitors of the Client shall be restricted to the reception area which shall be allowed to </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:766px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:2.3px;">be used temporarily and in common with the other Clients of Ofis Square. No visitors </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:746px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:2.34px;">shall be allowed to enter beyond the reception area, unless the Client has booked the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:727px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:-0.28px;">meeting room or has its own dedicated meeting room as part of the Allocated Seats which </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:707px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:2.66px;">shall in any event not exceed the total number of workstation or meeting room seats </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:687px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.07px;">obtained or booked by the Client. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:137px;bottom:668px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">6. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:668px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.4px;">The Client shall be permitted to put up name cards or displayed signboard, or any other </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:648px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:0.07px;">form of its name or signage of the prescribed size at the space specified by Ofis Square at </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:628px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.18px;">additional cost, as specified by Ofis Square. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:137px;bottom:609px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">7. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:609px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;word-spacing:0.82px;">The Client and its employees shall be entitled to bring in their removable and non-fixed </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:589px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.1px;">hardware like computers, laptops, printers, scanners, copiers, etc. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:137px;bottom:569px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">8. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:569px;letter-spacing:-0.15px;word-spacing:0.18px;">Ofis Square during the subsistence of the Contract may display the name of the Client at </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:549px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.22px;">the designated list of occupants of the Coworking Space. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:137px;bottom:530px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">9. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:530px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:3.69px;">The Client shall be entitled to access the Coworking Space and avail the Enterprise </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:510px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:2.31px;">Services with the help of Ofis Square mobile application (“Ofis Square App"). Also, the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:490px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.83px;">Client may also be entitled to obtain exclusive access cards for the Allocated Seats. It is </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:470px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:3.72px;">clarified that the exclusive access excludes all persons other than Ofis Square. It is </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:451px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:1.52px;">understood that the said access cards shall always remain the property of Ofis Square </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:431px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:4.52px;">and Ofis Square shall be entitled to deactivate the same in case of Termination or </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:411px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.13px;">suspension of this Contract. </span>
<span class="t s8" style="left:113px;bottom:372px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;">IV. </span><span class="t s8" style="left:165px;bottom:372px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.17px;">Payments of Charges: </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:332px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">1. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:332px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:-0.27px;">Client shall be required to make payment of Fixed Payment in Advance and within the 7 </span>
<span class="t sa" style="left:883px;bottom:339px;letter-spacing:-0.2px;">th </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:313px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:1.96px;">of each month even if there is a delay in  receipt of invoice from Ofis Square for such </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:293px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;">amount. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:273px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">2. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:273px;letter-spacing:-0.15px;word-spacing:0.45px;">Client shall be required to make payment of Pay as You Go Services within 7 days of the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:253px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.83px;">Invoice for such charges being raised. All invoices for the Pay as You Go Services would </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:234px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.07px;">ideally be raised at the end of a Month, unless otherwise thought fit by Ofis Square. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:214px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">3. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:214px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.78px;">Ofis Square will send all invoices electronically. In case of physical copy being required, </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:194px;letter-spacing:-0.15px;word-spacing:2.05px;">Client may obtain the same from the respective community manager of the Coworking </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:174px;letter-spacing:-0.03px;">Space. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:155px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">4. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:155px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:2.27px;">All payments are required to be made by Bank Transfers / Demand Drafts / Account </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:135px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.11px;">Payee Cheques / other Electronic means in favour of Ofis Spaces Private Limited. </span></div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="text-container"><span class="t s5" style="left:804px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:0.19px;">Page </span><span class="t s6" style="left:838px;bottom:1110px;">6 </span><span class="t s5" style="left:849px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:-0.31px;">of </span><span class="t s6" style="left:865px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:0.09px;">12 </span>
<span class="t s7" style="left:161px;bottom:33px;letter-spacing:0.09px;word-spacing:-0.18px;">Ofis Square </span>
<span class="t s7" style="left:731px;bottom:31px;letter-spacing:0.06px;">Client </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:1062px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">5. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:1062px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:3.78px;">Dishonor of Cheque, Declined Credit Cards or bounced ECS will be treated as non- </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:1043px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:-0.29px;">payment and shall attract Bank handling charges of Rs. 1500/- and other Consequences </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:1023px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.11px;">Of Non-Payment. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:1003px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">6. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:1003px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:-0.66px;">In case payments are made in any currency other than INR, the Client is required to make </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:983px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:2.97px;">sufficient payment so as to be effective credit of the entire payments in INR into the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:964px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:6.23px;">account of Ofis Square, post deduction of bank charges, forex charges, currency </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:944px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:0.15px;">fluctuations etc. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:924px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">7. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:924px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:-0.64px;">The Client hereby undertakes to make the payment of Fixed Payments and/or Pay as You </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:905px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:5.23px;">Go Services charges to such bank, financial institution or other entity as may be </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:885px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:2.66px;">designated by Ofis Square from time to time. Such payments made by the Client will </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:865px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.2px;">constitute a sufficient discharge of all obligations of the Client under this Contract. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:845px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">8. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:845px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:0.47px;">Client shall furnish the tax deduction certificates on a quarterly basis to Ofis Square, at </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:826px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:1.16px;">the rate applicable to the Ofis Square. Failure to deposit Tax Deducted at Source (TDS) </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:806px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.45px;">or, any other similar deductions by the Client or excess Deduction or Failure to Furnish </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:786px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;word-spacing:-1.05px;">such certificate shall amount to Non-Payment of charges and Ofis Square shall be entitled </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:766px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.09px;">to invoke the Consequences of Non- Payment. </span>
<span class="t s8" style="left:120px;bottom:727px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;">V. </span><span class="t s8" style="left:165px;bottom:727px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:-0.02px;">Consequences of Non-Payment </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:687px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">1. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:687px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:0.44px;">Ofis Square reserves the right to withhold services (including for the avoidance of doubt, </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:668px;letter-spacing:-0.15px;word-spacing:1.95px;">denying the Client access to its premises) while there are any outstanding fees and/or </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:648px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:0.2px;">interest or the Client is in breach of this Contract without requiring to first terminate the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:628px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;">Contract. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:609px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">2. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:609px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:1.87px;">In case of default in payment of charges or any part thereof within the due dates, the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:589px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:2.61px;">Client shall be liable to pay interest @ 1.5% p.m. or part thereof, computed from the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:569px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:3.06px;">Month for which the same is due compounded for each Month of non-payment until </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:549px;letter-spacing:-0.07px;word-spacing:-0.27px;">actual payments. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:530px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">3. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:530px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:1.17px;">In addition to the interest, the Client shall also be liable to pay a flat 5% late fee in the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:510px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.18px;">event of subsequent defaults. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:490px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">4. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:490px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:4.53px;">Client acknowledges that in case of repeated instances of non-payment or repeated </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:470px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.46px;">instances of damage being caused to the property of Ofis Square, Ofis Square may at its </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:451px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.06px;">sole discretion be entitled to seek 100% additional Security Deposit to allow the Client to </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:431px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.16px;">continue with the Contract. </span>
<span class="t s8" style="left:113px;bottom:391px;letter-spacing:-0.16px;">VI. </span><span class="t s8" style="left:165px;bottom:391px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.05px;">Obligations of the Client: </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:352px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">1. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:352px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:1.95px;">The Client shall be responsible and ensure that all its employees, visitors, staff or any </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:332px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:-0.57px;">other person entering the Coworking Space through or in connection with the Client shall </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:313px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:2.21px;">be bound by this Contract and shall also be required to abide by </span><span class="t s9" style="left:734px;bottom:313px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:2.34px;">all the Rules made </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:293px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:1.57px;">and/or published by Ofis Square relating to use of the Coworking Space, the Allocated </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:273px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:-0.24px;">Seats and other facilities, amenities and services made available at the Coworking Space. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:253px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">2. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:253px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:-1px;">The Client shall be required to obtain all necessary permissions, trade licenses, approvals, </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:234px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:0.82px;">and other statutory permissions for carrying on its business from Allocated Seats at the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:214px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;word-spacing:0.1px;">Coworking Space. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:194px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">3. </span><span class="t sb" style="left:165px;bottom:194px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:1.88px;">The Client acknowledges, accepts and provides its consent to the fact that the Client’s </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:174px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:1.55px;">personal KYC, telephone numbers and email id data shall be provided by the Client to </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:155px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:1.92px;">Ofis Square and further acknowledges that such data shall be used by Ofis Square to </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:135px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.07px;">inter alia provide access to Ofis Square App and in case of other emergencies. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:137px;bottom:115px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">4. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:115px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:-1px;">The Client shall not be entitled to make any addition or alteration or changes or re-arrange </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:95px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:4.09px;">the fittings and fixtures in the Allocated Seats or carry out work for installation or </span></div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="text-container"><span class="t s5" style="left:804px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:0.19px;">Page </span><span class="t s6" style="left:838px;bottom:1110px;">7 </span><span class="t s5" style="left:849px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:-0.31px;">of </span><span class="t s6" style="left:865px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:0.09px;">12 </span>
<span class="t s7" style="left:161px;bottom:33px;letter-spacing:0.09px;word-spacing:-0.18px;">Ofis Square </span>
<span class="t s7" style="left:731px;bottom:31px;letter-spacing:0.06px;">Client </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:1062px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:1.17px;">otherwise requiring any drilling, fixing, sticking or other activities within the Coworking </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:1043px;letter-spacing:-0.02px;">Space. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:137px;bottom:1023px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">5. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:1023px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.53px;">The Client must not install any cabling, IT or telecom connections without Ofis Square’s </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:1003px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:-0.33px;">consent, which Ofis Square may refuse at its absolute discretion. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:706px;bottom:1003px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;word-spacing:-0.49px;">In case any permission </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:983px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:-0.23px;">is granted, the Client shall permit Ofis Square to oversee any installations (for example IT </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:964px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:-0.28px;">or electrical systems) and to verify that such installations are in accordance with the plan </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:944px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:-0.59px;">approved by Ofis Square and such installations do not cause any interfere or disturbance. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:137px;bottom:924px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">6. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:924px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:3.31px;">The Client shall be held responsible and shall be liable towards Ofis Square for any </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:905px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:3.39px;">disruption or disturbance of business at the Coworking Space caused on account of </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:885px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:-0.27px;">activities carried out by the Client, its employee (s) and affiliate. This is in addition to any </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:865px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:1.18px;">claim that may arise against the Client by a co-occupant or a co-user at the Coworking </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:845px;letter-spacing:-0.02px;">Space. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:826px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">7. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:826px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.92px;">The Client assumes total liability towards the cost of any loss or damage to Ofis Square </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:806px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:-0.37px;">or any other Client, or any equipment, facilities, amenities, fixtures, furniture’s and other </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:786px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:2.28px;">installations in the Coworking Space caused deliberately or by negligence or resulting </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:766px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.19px;">from improper usage, utilization or enjoyment of any services at the Coworking Space by </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:746px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:-0.55px;">the Client, its employee(s) and affiliate or any person having entered the Coworking Space </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:727px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:-0.63px;">in relation to the Client, in any capacity whatsoever, which shall not be limited to the cost </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:707px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.83px;">of replacement of the damaged goods and also consequential losses caused due to such </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:687px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;">damage. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:668px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">8. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:668px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:1.58px;">Client is entitled to use the Coworking Space address as its registered office subject to </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:648px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:2.4px;">payment of additional charges and  obtaining prior written consent from Ofis Square. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:628px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.37px;">Client is not permitted to use the office address to obtain any other government licenses </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:609px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:-1.02px;">except of GST.The Client shall be liable to disclose the nature of this Contract under which </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:589px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:3.7px;">it is using the Coworking Space address as its address to any government &amp; semi- </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:569px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;word-spacing:0.48px;">government bodies, financial institutions, utility provider and other such persons where </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:549px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.08px;">the address is intended to be shown as the Client’s business address. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:530px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">9. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:530px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:3.75px;">The Client undertakes that it shall immediately on obtaining any registration at the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:510px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:-0.67px;">address of the Coworking Space shall inform Ofis Square of the fact and submit a certified </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:490px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:2.26px;">copy thereof and shall before the </span><span class="t s9" style="left:460px;bottom:490px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:2.25px;">expiry of the service Contract shall intimate all the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:470px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:-0.31px;">authorities that it has shifted its office from the Coworking Space to the new address and </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:451px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.84px;">shall also surrender the registrations obtained at the address of Ofis Square Coworking </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:431px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.11px;">Space and submit the proof thereof to Ofis Square. Such compliance shall be mandatory </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:411px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.14px;">part of Exit Formalities. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:391px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;">10. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:391px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.08px;">The Client agrees to pay promptly (i) all taxes and license fees which it is required to pay </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:372px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:4.58px;">to any governmental or semi government authority in its business(and, at the Ofis </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:352px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.44px;">Square’s request, will provide to the Ofis Square evidence of such payment); (ii) all other </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:332px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:7.72px;">applicable taxes, duties, levies or charges being made applicable to the instant </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:313px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:-1.11px;">transaction; (iii) payment of any utilities or other additional services obtained by the Client </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:293px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:-0.6px;">from Third Party (with consent of Ofis Square). For the avoidance of doubt, all charges set </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:273px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:1.22px;">forth in this Agreement are exclusive of any applicable taxes, which shall be borne and </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:253px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.01px;">paid by the Client. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:234px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;">11. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:234px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:1.18px;">Client must at all times comply with all applicable relevant laws and regulations in the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:214px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.13px;">conduct of its business in relation to this Contract and also with all relevant anti-bribery </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:194px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;word-spacing:-0.07px;">and anti-corruption laws. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:174px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;">12. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:174px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:3.44px;">Client shall under no circumstances be entitled to seek refund of any charges made </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:155px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;">payment by the Client. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:135px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;">13. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:135px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:-0.34px;">The Client shall be solely responsible for any data and/or software used and/or stored at </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:115px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:1.94px;">the servers of Ofis Square and Ofis Square shall be entitled to terminate such storage </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:95px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:-0.24px;">and/or access to the Ofis Square network, if it is brought to its notice or otherwise comes </span></div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="text-container"><span class="t s5" style="left:804px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:0.19px;">Page </span><span class="t s6" style="left:838px;bottom:1110px;">8 </span><span class="t s5" style="left:849px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:-0.31px;">of </span><span class="t s6" style="left:865px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:0.09px;">12 </span>
<span class="t s7" style="left:161px;bottom:33px;letter-spacing:0.09px;word-spacing:-0.18px;">Ofis Square </span>
<span class="t s7" style="left:731px;bottom:31px;letter-spacing:0.06px;">Client </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:1062px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:-0.24px;">to know that the Client or any of it employee(s) or associates content and/or data and/or </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:1043px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.07px;">software is unlawful and/or violates any rules, laws including piracy laws. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:1023px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;">14. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:1023px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:1.51px;">Client must not carry on any business that competes with the business of Ofis Square </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:1003px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.05px;">inter alia of running Coworking offices / services offices / Enterprise Services during the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:983px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;word-spacing:-0.03px;">period of this Contract and for a period of 2 years after expiry of this Contract. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:964px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;">15. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:964px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:-1.03px;">Client acknowledges that the ownership and all other rights in respect of the trademark/s, </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:944px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:-0.58px;">goodwill, trade name/s, copyright/s and/or any other intellectual property right/s of Ofis </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:924px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:1.57px;">Square shall at all times belong exclusively to Ofis Square, whether during the term of </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:905px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.09px;">the Contract or after its expiry / termination and Client shall not be entitled to any such </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:885px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:6.36px;">intellectual property right/s of Ofis Square or to the use thereof in any manner </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:865px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:0.51px;">whatsoever. Client shall not use the name and/or logo of Ofis Square or any pictures or </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:845px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:2.64px;">illustrations of any portion of any properties (including the Coworking Space and the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:826px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:-1.02px;">Allocated Seats) in any advertisement, promotional material and/or other media coverage, </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:806px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.11px;">save and except with the prior written consent of Ofis Square. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:786px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;">16. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:786px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:0.16px;">Client further acknowledges that Ofis Square shall be entitled to include the name / logo </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:766px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.11px;">of Client in any of its promotional material, advertisement, reports, media coverage, etc. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:746px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;">17. </span><span class="t sb" style="left:165px;bottom:746px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:0.78px;">It is the Client’s responsibility to arrange insurance for its own property which it brings </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:727px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.11px;">in to the Coworking Space and for its own liability to its employees and to third parties </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:707px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;">18. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:707px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:0.49px;">Without prejudice to the specific indemnities, the Client hereby indemnifies and assures </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:687px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.49px;">to keep Ofis Square indemnified, against any loss, damage, claim or demand arising out </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:668px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:1.02px;">of any act of omission or commission by Client. Client shall also indemnify Ofis Square </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:648px;letter-spacing:-0.07px;word-spacing:3.97px;">from and against any and all third party claims, liabilities, and expenses including </span>
<span class="t sb" style="left:165px;bottom:628px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:1.26px;">reasonable attorneys’ fees, resulting from any breach or alleged breach of this Contract </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:609px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;word-spacing:0.01px;">by Client, its guests or invitees. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:589px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;">19. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:589px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:3px;">Client acknowledges that all areas outside the Allocated Seats are of restricted or no </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:569px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.79px;">access for the Client and Client shall not be entitled to occupy or use any areas outside </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:549px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.82px;">the Allocated Seats other than for the purposes for which they have been earmarked by </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:530px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:4.17px;">Ofis Square. Client shall be fully responsible for ensuring that the privacy of other </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:510px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:1.91px;">occupiers of the Coworking Space is not breached by Client or any of its employees or </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:490px;letter-spacing:-0.04px;">visitors. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:470px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;">20. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:470px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.54px;">Client shall not entitled to enter into any other seats / workstations / offices / allocates </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:451px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:2.38px;">areas of other clients / meeting rooms / restricted areas in the Coworking Space and </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:431px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:1.84px;">Client shall be fully responsible for ensuring that the privacy of other occupiers of the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:411px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:-0.04px;">Coworking Space is not breached by Client or any of its employees or visitors. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:391px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;">21. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:391px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.44px;">Any and all taxes, duties, stamp charges and other expenses arising out of or relating to </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:372px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:-0.29px;">the execution of this contract (including those assessed subsequently) shall be borne and </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:352px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.16px;">payable by the Client, for executing this Contract. </span>
<span class="t s8" style="left:106px;bottom:313px;letter-spacing:-0.17px;">VII. </span><span class="t s8" style="left:165px;bottom:313px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.09px;">Rights / Obligations of Ofis Square : </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:273px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">1. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:273px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:-0.3px;">Ofis Square shall be obliged to provide Enterprise Services as agreed herein to the Client, </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:253px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.82px;">subject to the Client complying with the terms and conditions for use and enjoyment of </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:234px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.15px;">the Enterprise Services. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:214px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">2. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:214px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:1.98px;">Ofis Square shall ensure that the services are kept running at all times. However Ofis </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:194px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:1.56px;">Square shall not have any liability in case of any services being disrupted due to third </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:174px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.12px;">party failures or intervening events over which Ofis Square has no control. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:155px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">3. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:155px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:1.85px;">Ofis Square or its past, present and future officers employees individually shall not be </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:135px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:4.38px;">liable for any special, incidental, indirect, punitive, consequential or other damages </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:115px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:0.74px;">whatsoever (including, but not limited to damages for loss of profits, loss of confidential </span></div>

<div class="text-container"><span class="t s5" style="left:804px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:0.19px;">Page </span><span class="t s6" style="left:838px;bottom:1110px;">9 </span><span class="t s5" style="left:849px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:-0.31px;">of </span><span class="t s6" style="left:865px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:0.09px;">12 </span>
<span class="t s7" style="left:161px;bottom:33px;letter-spacing:0.09px;word-spacing:-0.18px;">Ofis Square </span>
<span class="t s7" style="left:731px;bottom:31px;letter-spacing:0.06px;">Client </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:1062px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:2.28px;">or other information, business interruption, personal injury, loss of privacy, failure to </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:1043px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.12px;">meet any duty or otherwise under or in connection with any provision of this Contract). </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:1023px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">4. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:1023px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.13px;">The liability of Ofis Square shall under no circumstances exceed a sum equivalent to the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:1003px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:-1.08px;">Fixed Payments actually paid by the Client in the last 3 Months from such liability arising. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:983px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">5. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:983px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:-0.63px;">Ofis Square hereby indemnifies and assures to keep Client indemnified, against any third </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:964px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:-0.6px;">party loss, damage, claim or demand arising from any Material breach of this Contract by </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:944px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.16px;">Ofis Square or its employee, to the extent stated herein. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:924px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">6. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:924px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.8px;">Ofis Square shall have a right of access of the Allocated Seats, with or without notice to </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:905px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:-1.01px;">the Client, for the purposes of safety, cleaning, repairs, maintenance, in case of emergency </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:885px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:1.57px;">or for any other purpose. Ofis Square shall be entitled to move the furniture / fixtures </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:865px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:-0.66px;">within the Allocated Seats and shall also be entitled to shift the Allocated Seats to another </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:845px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:-0.58px;">location within the same Coworking Space, however without reducing the total area of the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:826px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.05px;">Allocated Seats and without affecting the amenities available to Client. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:806px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">7. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:806px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:-0.34px;">Ofis Square shall be entitled to add / alter / remove amenities, facilities or services at the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:786px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:-0.23px;">Coworking Space at any time. Ofis Square shall also be entitled to provide the Enterprise </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:766px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:0.02px;">Services or parts thereof through its affiliates or third parties, at its sole discretion. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:746px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">8. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:746px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.5px;">Ofis Square does not control and shall not be responsible for the actions of other clients </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:727px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.08px;">or any other third parties at the Coworking Space. If a dispute arises between Client and </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:707px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:4.54px;">other clients of Ofis Square, or their invitees or guests, Ofis Square shall have no </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:687px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;word-spacing:-0.05px;">responsibility or obligation to participate, mediate or indemnify any party. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:668px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">9. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:668px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.47px;">Ofis Sqaure shall not be involved in or liable for, the provision of products or services by </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:648px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:-0.27px;">third parties (“Third Party Services”) that Client may elect to purchase in connection with </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:628px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:-0.57px;">their access to Enterprise Services including Pay As You Go services, even if it appears on </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:609px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:-0.62px;">their invoice. Third Party Services are provided solely by the applicable third party (“Third </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:589px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.12px;">Party Service Providers”) and pursuant to separate arrangements between Client and the </span>
<span class="t sb" style="left:165px;bottom:569px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:0.83px;">applicable Third Party Service Providers. These Third Party Service Providers’ terms and </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:549px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.86px;">conditions will control with respect to the relevant Third Party Services and Ofis Square </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:530px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:1.86px;">shall have no obligation or liability in connection with delivery or performance of such </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:510px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.05px;">Third Party Services, except as provided in the Contract. </span>
<span class="t s8" style="left:99px;bottom:470px;letter-spacing:-0.18px;">VIII. </span><span class="t s8" style="left:165px;bottom:470px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;">Termination: </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:431px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">1. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:431px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:-0.64px;">Contract can be terminated by Client during the Lock in Period by complying with all Exit </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:411px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:-0.97px;">Formalities including making payment of unpaid portion of the Committed Fixed Charges. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:391px;letter-spacing:-0.15px;word-spacing:0.16px;">In case of Material Breach of Ofis Square during Lock-In period, and upon failure to cure </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:372px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:1.21px;">Material Breach by Ofis Square despite notice by Client, Lock-in would stand waived in </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:352px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;word-spacing:0.14px;">terms hereof; </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:332px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">2. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:332px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:4.07px;">Contract cannot be terminated by Ofis Square during the Lock in Period except for </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:313px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.13px;">Material Breach of Client. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:293px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">3. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:293px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:2.3px;">If either party desires to not continue the Contract beyond the Lock in Period, then a </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:273px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:0.85px;">notice of such intention with the duration of the agreed Notice Period herein post expiry </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:253px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.06px;">of the Lock-In Period would be required to be given. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:234px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">4. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:234px;letter-spacing:-0.15px;word-spacing:3.8px;">In case of Material Breach by Ofis Square, Client shall be entitled to terminate this </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:214px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:1.59px;">Contract by giving 30 days notice to enable Ofis Square to cure the Material Breach; If </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:194px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:-0.27px;">Ofis Square fails to cure the Material Breach despite expiry of 30 days, the Client shall be </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:174px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:-0.57px;">entitled to thereafter end this Contract  by stopping to avail any of the Enterprise Services </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:155px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.14px;">and completing the Exit Formalities. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:135px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">5. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:135px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:1.19px;">In case the Contract is terminated by Client during the Lock In Period due to failure of </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:115px;letter-spacing:-0.15px;word-spacing:1.25px;">Ofis Square to cure a Material Breach despite notice having been given, then the Client </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:95px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.87px;">would be relieved of making payment of the balance Committed Fixed Charges from the </span></div>

</div>

</div>
