<div class="text-container"><span class="t s5" style="left:796px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:0.19px;">Page </span><span class="t s6" style="left:830px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:0.09px;">10 </span><span class="t s5" style="left:849px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:0.06px;">of </span><span class="t s6" style="left:865px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:0.09px;">12 </span>
<span class="t s7" style="left:161px;bottom:33px;letter-spacing:0.09px;word-spacing:-0.18px;">Ofis Square </span>
<span class="t s7" style="left:731px;bottom:31px;letter-spacing:0.06px;">Client </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:1062px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:2.31px;">date of the Client completing the Exit Formalities. It is clarified that the Client would </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:1043px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:-0.26px;">continue to remain liable for payment of the Fixed Payments upto the period till when the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:1023px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.14px;">Client has utilized the services. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:1003px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">6. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:1003px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:3.78px;">In case of Material Breach by Client, Ofis Square shall be entitled to terminate this </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:983px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.8px;">Contract by giving 30 days’ notice to enable Client to cure the Material Breach; If Client </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:964px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.85px;">fails to cure the Material Breach despite expiry of 30 days, Ofis Square shall be entitled </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:944px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:-0.62px;">to forthwith end this Contract and become entitled to the entire balance Committed Fixed </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:924px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:1.89px;">Charges, if the Lock In period has not expired and shall be entitled to take all actions </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:905px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:-0.27px;">including but not limited to deactivating access of the Client to the Coworking Space and </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:885px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.14px;">the Allocated Seats. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:865px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">7. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:865px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:-0.23px;">In case of the Client  is insolvent or bankrupt, then this Contract shall be deemed to have </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:845px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;word-spacing:-0.32px;">automatically come to an end on the preceding day of order of admission of insolvency or </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:826px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:1.54px;">bankruptcy proceedings without any formal notice being required to be given by either </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:806px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.09px;">Party and the Security Deposit shall stand forfeited. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:786px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">8. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:786px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:0.07px;">In case the Client abandons the Coworking Space and/or starts removing its goods from </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:766px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:-0.25px;">the Coworking Space without prior written confirmation from Ofis Square, the same shall </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:746px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.05px;">be deemed to be a notice of immediate termination by the Client. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:727px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">9. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:727px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:-0.6px;">Upon termination of this Contract by either party and until completion of Exit Formalities </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:707px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.81px;">by the Client, Ofis Square shall have a lien over the properties of the Client lying within </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:687px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.81px;">the Coworking Space and Ofis Square shall be entitled to restrain removal of any goods </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:668px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.12px;">by the Client from the Coworking Space until Exit Formalities are completed. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:648px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;">10. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:648px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:0.9px;">In case the rights of Ofis Square to the Coworking Space are terminated and/or or user </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:628px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:4.14px;">rights are restrained/suspended, then Ofis Square would be entitled to immediately </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:609px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:4.46px;">terminate this Contract and refund the Security Deposit within 30 days from such </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:589px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.09px;">termination subject to the Client completing all Exit Formalities. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:569px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;">11. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:171px;bottom:569px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:-0.65px;">If any government/ judicial /quasi-judicial authority or other legislative body has passed </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:549px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.07px;">an order against the Client that the Client is conducting or is under investigation for any </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:530px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.84px;">unlawful/ illegal/criminal activities in their business, then Ofis Square shall be entitled </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:510px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.13px;">to terminate this Contract with immediate effect. </span>
<span class="t s8" style="left:112px;bottom:470px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;">IX. </span><span class="t s8" style="left:165px;bottom:470px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:-0.01px;">Consequences of Termination: </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:431px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">1. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:431px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:1.2px;">Upon termination in the manner aforesaid, the Client shall be required to complete the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:411px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:4.09px;">Exit Formalities. Termination by Client for the purposes of computing the period of </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:391px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:1.93px;">Payments required to be made by the Client shall be deemed to be effective only upon </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:372px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.04px;">completing the Exit Formalities and full payments being made by the Client. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:352px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">2. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:352px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.44px;">Upon termination, in addition to other remedies, Ofis Square shall be entitled to prevent </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:332px;letter-spacing:-0.15px;word-spacing:0.5px;">access to the Client to the Coworking Space or any other Services obtained by the Client </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:313px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:0.46px;">under this Contract from the date of expiry of Notice Period agreed herein. However, the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:293px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.81px;">same shall not exonerate the Client from its liability to make payment unless the Client </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:273px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.15px;">has completed the Exit Formalities. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:143px;bottom:253px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">3. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:253px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:2.64px;">Ofis Square shall have a lien and/or charge on all goods brought into the Coworking </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:234px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:1.21px;">Space by the Client under this Contract until the Exit Formalities are completed by the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:214px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:0.86px;">Client with a right to store the goods at an alternate location. Client hereby indemnifies </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:194px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.06px;">Ofis Square in respect of any claims of any third parties in respect of such goods. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:143px;bottom:174px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">4. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:170px;bottom:174px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:0.15px;">Ofis Square shall be entitled to dispose off any property remaining in or on the Allocated </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:155px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:1.58px;">Seats area and/or Coworking Space after the termination or expiration of the Contract </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:135px;letter-spacing:-0.15px;word-spacing:2.35px;">and will not have any obligation to store such property, and Client hereby waives any </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:115px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:-0.26px;">claims or demands regarding such property or Ofis Square’s handling or disposal of such </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:95px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:-0.95px;">property. Client will be responsible for paying any fees reasonably incurred by Ofis Square </span></div>

</div>

<div class="text-container"><span class="t s5" style="left:796px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:0.19px;">Page </span><span class="t s6" style="left:830px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:0.09px;">11 </span><span class="t s5" style="left:849px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:0.06px;">of </span><span class="t s6" style="left:865px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:0.09px;">12 </span>
<span class="t s7" style="left:161px;bottom:33px;letter-spacing:0.09px;word-spacing:-0.18px;">Ofis Square </span>
<span class="t s7" style="left:731px;bottom:31px;letter-spacing:0.06px;">Client </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:1062px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;word-spacing:2.94px;">regarding such removal. Ofis Square shall have no implied obligations as a bailee or </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:1043px;letter-spacing:-0.05px;">custodian. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:143px;bottom:1023px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">5. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:1023px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:1.88px;">Ofis Square shall not be under any obligation to forward or hold Client’s mail or other </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:1003px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:5.59px;">packages delivered to Coworking Space address post expiry or termination of this </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:983px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;">Contract. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:964px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">6. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:964px;letter-spacing:-0.15px;word-spacing:2.73px;">Ofis Square shall refund the Refundable Security Deposit no later than 30 days from </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:944px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:1.2px;">completion of the Exit Formalities by the Client, which however shall not carry interest </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:924px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:1.02px;">under any circumstances. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:395px;bottom:924px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:1.14px;">Beyond 30 days, Client shall be entitled to interest @ 1.5 % </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:905px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.06px;">p.m. for such period of delay. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:138px;bottom:885px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">7. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:885px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:1.59px;">In case of Immediate Termination, in addition to other remedies,  Ofis Square shall be </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:865px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:2px;">entitled to forthwith suspend and prevent access of the Coworking Space to the Client </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:845px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.1px;">and revoke all authorities granted hereunder forthwith without any prior notice. </span>
<span class="t s8" style="left:119px;bottom:806px;letter-spacing:-0.03px;">X. </span><span class="t s8" style="left:165px;bottom:806px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;">Renewal: </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:137px;bottom:766px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">1. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:766px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:0.4px;">The Client acknowledges that although the Duration of this Contract has been fixed, yet </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:746px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.86px;">the Client shall be obliged to intimate its intention not to continue beyond the Duration </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:727px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:1.21px;">hereby agreed, by initiating the Exit Formalities and giving a written intimation of such </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:707px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.14px;">intention to not renew this Contract; </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:137px;bottom:687px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">2. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:687px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:0.5px;">In case Ofis Square does not receive such written intimation 6 months before the end of </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:668px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.4px;">the Duration, this Contract shall automatically stand renewed for a period of 12 months </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:648px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:1.2px;">with a lock in period of 6 months from the end of the Duration on the same terms and </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:628px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.15px;">conditions of this Contract, including escalation on the terms agreed herein </span>
<span class="t s8" style="left:112px;bottom:589px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;">XI. </span><span class="t s8" style="left:165px;bottom:589px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;">Miscellaneous: </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:137px;bottom:549px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">1. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:549px;letter-spacing:-0.07px;">All </span><span class="t s9" style="left:208px;bottom:549px;letter-spacing:-0.04px;">previous </span><span class="t s9" style="left:299px;bottom:549px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;">correspondences, </span><span class="t s9" style="left:464px;bottom:549px;letter-spacing:-0.15px;">emails, </span><span class="t s9" style="left:544px;bottom:549px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;">agreements, </span><span class="t s9" style="left:666px;bottom:549px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;">understandings, </span><span class="t s9" style="left:822px;bottom:549px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;">writings, </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:530px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.14px;">commitments, LOA / LOI etc stand superseded with this Contract; </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:137px;bottom:510px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">2. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:510px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.07px;">Client acknowledges that the Allocated Seats are complete in all nature and furnished as </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:490px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:2.61px;">per the agreed terms of the LOI. No complaint in respect of any obligation or liability </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:470px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:3.02px;">accrued prior to this Contract survives and any claim relating thereto stands waived </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:451px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.01px;">and/or abandoned and/or withdrawn; </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:137px;bottom:431px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">3. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:431px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.1px;">Any notices relating to termination of this Agreement: </span>
<span class="t sc" style="left:165px;bottom:411px;"> </span><span class="t s9" style="left:193px;bottom:411px;letter-spacing:-0.06px;">By </span><span class="t s9" style="left:236px;bottom:411px;letter-spacing:-0.2px;">the </span><span class="t s9" style="left:283px;bottom:411px;letter-spacing:-0.06px;">Client </span><span class="t sb" style="left:354px;bottom:411px;">– </span><span class="t s9" style="left:384px;bottom:411px;letter-spacing:-0.04px;">shall </span><span class="t s9" style="left:446px;bottom:411px;letter-spacing:0.1px;">be </span><span class="t s9" style="left:486px;bottom:411px;letter-spacing:-0.07px;">delivered </span><span class="t s9" style="left:581px;bottom:411px;letter-spacing:-0.21px;">to </span><span class="t s9" style="left:619px;bottom:411px;letter-spacing:-0.2px;">the </span><span class="t s9" style="left:666px;bottom:411px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;">Community </span><span class="t s9" style="left:784px;bottom:411px;letter-spacing:-0.07px;">Manager </span><span class="t s9" style="left:877px;bottom:411px;letter-spacing:0.06px;">at </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:193px;bottom:391px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:0.88px;">community@ofisspaces.com. A copy of the notice shall also be sent to Ofis Square at </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:193px;bottom:372px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:-0.05px;">its registered office address by post and via email at ho@ofisspaces.com. </span>
<span class="t sc" style="left:165px;bottom:352px;"> </span><span class="t s9" style="left:193px;bottom:352px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:0.48px;">By Ofis Square – shall be delivered in writing to the Client’s registered email address </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:193px;bottom:332px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:3.75px;">as provided in this Agreement and shall also be sent via post to their registered </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:193px;bottom:313px;letter-spacing:-0.06px;">address. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:293px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.81px;">All notices shall be deemed valid and effective if sent by post, on the third business day </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:273px;letter-spacing:-0.07px;word-spacing:-0.16px;">following the date of dispatch. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:137px;bottom:253px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">4. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:253px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:3.41px;">Client acknowledges that Ofis Square shall be entitled to induct other Clients in the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:234px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:1.48px;">Coworking Space who are in competing businesses as that of the Client and the Client </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:214px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.15px;">shall not have any right of exclusivity as against Ofis Square. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:137px;bottom:194px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">5. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:194px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:0.82px;">This Contract or any rights obtained hereunder cannot be assigned by the Client in any </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:174px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:1.62px;">manner whatsoever, including but not limited to any corporate restructuring, save and </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:155px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:2.23px;">except with written consent of Ofis Square and payment of applicable charges, by the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:135px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;">Client. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:137px;bottom:115px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">6. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:115px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.11px;">Client acknowledges that no rights/title in property is being created by this Contract. </span></div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="text-container"><span class="t s5" style="left:796px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:0.19px;">Page </span><span class="t s6" style="left:830px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:0.09px;">12 </span><span class="t s5" style="left:849px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:0.06px;">of </span><span class="t s6" style="left:865px;bottom:1110px;letter-spacing:0.09px;">12 </span>
<span class="t s7" style="left:161px;bottom:33px;letter-spacing:0.09px;word-spacing:-0.18px;">Ofis Square </span>
<span class="t s7" style="left:731px;bottom:31px;letter-spacing:0.06px;">Client </span>
<span class="t s8" style="left:105px;bottom:1043px;letter-spacing:-0.15px;">XII. </span><span class="t s8" style="left:165px;bottom:1043px;letter-spacing:-0.07px;">Parking: </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:137px;bottom:1003px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">1. </span><span class="t sb" style="left:164px;bottom:1003px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;word-spacing:-0.01px;">The parking will be at Client’s risk basis and the Ofis Square shall not be responsible for </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:983px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;">any </span><span class="t s9" style="left:205px;bottom:983px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.05px;">type of loss/ damage to any four/two wheeler. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:137px;bottom:964px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">2. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:964px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.84px;">Overnight four wheeler parking will not be permitted without prior written intimation to </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:944px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.1px;">the security in charge of the said building/said commercial complex. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:137px;bottom:924px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">3. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:924px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:-1.05px;">The Client shall not encroach any other four/two wheeler at parking space in any manner. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:137px;bottom:905px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">4. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:905px;letter-spacing:-0.14px;word-spacing:1.24px;">Speed limit in all basements is 10km/hr and the Client adheres to follow the same.The </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:885px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.09px;">Ofis Square however may restrict the service of the Client if speed limit is violated. </span>
<span class="t s8" style="left:99px;bottom:826px;letter-spacing:-0.16px;">XIII. </span><span class="t s8" style="left:165px;bottom:826px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.16px;">Dispute Resolution: </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:137px;bottom:786px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">1. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:786px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:4.13px;">Unless prohibited by any applicable law in force, all claims, disputes differences or </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:766px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:2.28px;">questions of any nature arising between the parties to this Contract in relation to the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:746px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;word-spacing:-0.59px;">terms used in or clause of this Contract or as to the rights, duties, liabilities of the Parties </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:727px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:2.65px;">arising out of this Contract shall be referred to arbitration under the Arbitration and </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:707px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;word-spacing:0.34px;">Conciliation Act, 1996 including any amendments thereto by a sole arbitrator appointed </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:687px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.14px;">mutually by the Parties. That the seat and venue of arbitration proceedings shall be New </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:668px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.08px;">Delhi. The arbitration proceedings shall be conducted in the english language. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:137px;bottom:648px;letter-spacing:0.11px;">2. </span><span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:648px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:1.18px;">Subject to the above clause. The Parties agree that all judicial and/or legal proceedings </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:628px;letter-spacing:-0.1px;word-spacing:-0.99px;">relating to or arising out of this Contract as maintainable under law shall be filed by either </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:609px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;word-spacing:-0.32px;">Party in the courts of competent jurisdiction situated at Delhi only, to the exclusion of all </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:164px;bottom:589px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.13px;">other courts. </span>
<span class="t s8" style="left:100px;bottom:546px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;">XIV. </span><span class="t s8" style="left:165px;bottom:546px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.17px;">Governing Law: </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:526px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:0.04px;">The Relationship between the Client and Ofis Square will be governed by the Indian law. </span>
<span class="t s8" style="left:107px;bottom:480px;letter-spacing:-0.08px;">XV. </span><span class="t s8" style="left:165px;bottom:480px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.17px;">Electronic Signature Acknowledgement And Consent: </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:457px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:3.06px;">Each party agrees that the electronic signatures, whether digital or encrypted, of the </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:438px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;word-spacing:1.22px;">parties included in this Agreement, if any, are intended to authenticate this Agreement </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:418px;letter-spacing:-0.12px;word-spacing:0.08px;">and to have the same force and effect as manual signatures. </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:379px;letter-spacing:-0.11px;word-spacing:-0.24px;">Under penalty of perjury, the signatory hereby affirm that the electronic signature affixed </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:359px;letter-spacing:-0.13px;word-spacing:0.83px;">within this Agreement, were signed by the authorised signatory with full knowledge and </span>
<span class="t s9" style="left:165px;bottom:339px;letter-spacing:-0.09px;">consent and the signing party is legally bound to these terms and conditions. </span></div>

</div>

</div>

<script>
    const metadata = JSON.parse(document.getElementById("metadata").text);
    document.title = metadata.title || metadata.fileName;

    const annotations = JSON.parse(document.getElementById("annotations").text);
    const pages = document.querySelectorAll(".page");

    const createAnnotation = function(container, data, pageNo) {
        if (data.type !== "Link" && data.type !== "TextLink") {
            return;
        }
        if (!data.action) {
            return;
        }

        const annotation = document.createElement("div");
        annotation.setAttribute("style", "");
        annotation.style.left = data.bounds[0] + "px";
        annotation.style.top = data.bounds[1] + "px";
        annotation.style.width = data.bounds[2] + "px";
        annotation.style.height = data.bounds[3] + "px";
        annotation.dataset.type = data.type;
        if (data.objref) {
            annotation.dataset.objref = data.objref;
        }

        if (data.appearance) {
            annotation.style.backgroundImage = "url('" + data.appearance + "')";
            annotation.style.backgroundSize = "100% 100%";
        }

        if (data.action.type === "URI") {
            const element = document.createElement("a");
            element.href = data.action.uri;
            element.title = data.action.uri;
            element.target = "_blank";
            element.style.position = "absolute";
            element.style.width = "100%";
            element.style.height = "100%";
            annotation.appendChild(element);
        } else {
            annotation.addEventListener("click", () => {
                switch (data.action.type) {
                    case "GoTo":
                        pages[data.action.page - 1].scrollIntoView();
                        break;

                    case "Named":
                        switch (data.action.name) {
                            case "NextPage":
                                pages[pageNo - 2].scrollIntoView();
                                break;
                            case "PrevPage":
                                pages[pageNo].scrollIntoView();
                                break;
                            case "FirstPage":
                                pages[0].scrollIntoView();
                                break;
                            case "LastPage":
                                pages[metadata.pagecount - 1].scrollIntoView();
                                break;
                        }
                        break;
                }
            });
        }
        container.append(annotation);
    };

    annotations.pages.forEach(pageAnnotations => {
        const pageNo = pageAnnotations.page;
        const annotationsContainer = document.createElement("div");
        annotationsContainer.className = "annotations-container";
        annotationsContainer.style.width = metadata.bounds[pageNo - 1][0];
        annotationsContainer.style.height = metadata.bounds[pageNo - 1][1];
        pageAnnotations.annotations.forEach(annotation => createAnnotation(annotationsContainer, annotation, pageNo));
        pages[pageNo - 1].appendChild(annotationsContainer);
    });
</script>
</body>
</html>
